creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #15)

The test from my original description still fails
and still involves:

Fatal kernel mode data abort: 'Alignment Fault' on read

but also a sleepable lock, where the orginal
report did not.

So the details are different.

For reference:

# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/netinet6/exthdr:exthdr
sys/netinet6/exthdr:exthdr  ->  Kernel page fault with the following non-sleepable locks held:
shared rm in6_ifaddr_lock (in6_ifaddr_lock) r = 0 (0xc0bd6070) locked @ /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/sys/netinet6/in6.c:1636
